title: Department Manager Vacancy at The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
company: The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners:
The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners!
